---
title: "BAN404 2026 Exam Snippet Bank"
subtitle: "Most-likely quick snippets for Task 1 + Task 2"
author: "Candidate"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 10pt
    geometry:
      - top=20mm
      - left=20mm
      - right=20mm
      - bottom=20mm
    fig-align: center
    fig-width: 6
    fig-height: 4
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    number-sections: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight-style: kate
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  eval: false
  error: true
---

# Snippet naming convention (use this for fast recall)

Use prefix + task + intent:

- `b404_t1_*` = Task 1 snippets
- `b404_t2_*` = Task 2 snippets
- `b404_util_*` = shared helpers

Suffix logic:

- `_load` = data + package load
- `_fit` = model fitting
- `_cv` = cross-validation
- `_eval` = evaluation metrics
- `_final` = side-by-side model recommendation table

Example: `b404_t2_logit_eval` = Task 2 logistic regression prediction + threshold metrics.

# Ready-to-copy R snippets (RStudio snippets format)

## Core utilities

```r
snippet b404_util_auc
auc_rank <- function(y_true, score, positive = "Yes") {
  y_chr <- as.character(y_true)
  y_bin <- if_else(y_chr == positive, 1, 0)
  n1 <- sum(y_bin == 1)
  n0 <- sum(y_bin == 0)
  if (n1 == 0 || n0 == 0) return(NA_real_)
  r <- rank(score)
  (sum(r[y_bin == 1]) - n1 * (n1 + 1) / 2) / (n1 * n0)
}
```

```r
snippet b404_util_metrics
class_metrics <- function(y_true, p_hat, threshold = 0.5, positive = "Yes", cost_fn = 3) {
  y_chr <- as.character(y_true)
  negative <- setdiff(sort(unique(y_chr)), positive)[1]
  actual <- factor(y_chr, levels = c(negative, positive))
  pred <- factor(if_else(p_hat >= threshold, positive, negative), levels = c(negative, positive))
  cm <- table(actual = actual, pred = pred)
  tn <- cm[negative, negative]; fp <- cm[negative, positive]
  fn <- cm[positive, negative]; tp <- cm[positive, positive]
  tibble(
    threshold = threshold,
    accuracy = (tp + tn) / sum(cm),
    sensitivity = tp / (tp + fn),
    specificity = tn / (tn + fp),
    auc = auc_rank(actual, p_hat, positive = positive),
    expected_cost = cost_fn * fn + fp
  )
}
```

## Task 1 snippets

```r
snippet b404_t1_load
library(tidyverse)
library(glmnet)
library(mgcv)
df_t1 <- read_csv("../task1_data.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
X <- model.matrix(y ~ ., data = df_t1)[, -1]
y <- df_t1$y
```

```r
snippet b404_t1_reg_cv
set.seed(404)
cv_ridge <- cv.glmnet(X, y, alpha = 0, nfolds = 10, standardize = TRUE)
cv_lasso <- cv.glmnet(X, y, alpha = 1, nfolds = 10, standardize = TRUE)
cv_enet <- cv.glmnet(X, y, alpha = 0.5, nfolds = 10, standardize = TRUE)
tibble(
  model = c("ridge", "lasso", "enet"),
  lambda_min = c(cv_ridge$lambda.min, cv_lasso$lambda.min, cv_enet$lambda.min),
  cvm_min = c(min(cv_ridge$cvm), min(cv_lasso$cvm), min(cv_enet$cvm))
)
```

```r
snippet b404_t1_boot_var
set.seed(1)
B <- 1500
n <- length(y)
boot_var <- replicate(B, var(sample(y, size = n, replace = TRUE)))
var_hat <- var(y)
ci_pct <- quantile(boot_var, c(0.025, 0.975))
ci_norm <- c(var_hat - 1.96 * sd(boot_var), var_hat + 1.96 * sd(boot_var))
tibble(var_hat = var_hat, pct_low = ci_pct[1], pct_high = ci_pct[2], norm_low = ci_norm[1], norm_high = ci_norm[2])
```

```r
snippet b404_t1_gam_compare
fit_ols <- lm(y ~ ., data = df_t1)
fit_gam <- gam(y ~ s(x1, k = 6) + s(x2, k = 6) + s(x3, k = 6) + x4 + x5 + x6, data = df_t1)
y_hat_ols <- predict(fit_ols, newdata = df_t1)
y_hat_gam <- predict(fit_gam, newdata = df_t1)
tibble(
  model = c("OLS", "GAM"),
  mse = c(mean((y - y_hat_ols)^2), mean((y - y_hat_gam)^2)),
  r2_like = c(summary(fit_ols)$adj.r.squared, summary(fit_gam)$r.sq)
)
```

## Task 2 snippets

```r
snippet b404_t2_load
library(tidyverse)
library(randomForest)
library(gbm)
df_c <- read_csv("../customer_data.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub("[\\. ]", "_", tolower(.x))) %>%
  mutate(
    churn = factor(churn, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    international_plan = factor(international_plan),
    voice_mail_plan = factor(voice_mail_plan),
    area_code = factor(area_code)
  ) %>%
  select(-total_day_charge, -total_eve_charge, -total_night_charge, -total_intl_charge)
set.seed(42)
idx <- sample(seq_len(nrow(df_c)), size = floor(0.8 * nrow(df_c)))
train_c <- df_c[idx, ]
test_c <- df_c[-idx, ]
```

```r
snippet b404_t2_logit_fit
logit_fit <- glm(
  churn ~ account_length + international_plan + voice_mail_plan + number_vmail_messages +
    total_day_minutes + total_day_calls + total_eve_minutes + total_night_minutes +
    total_intl_minutes + customer_service_calls,
  data = train_c,
  family = binomial()
)
p_logit <- predict(logit_fit, newdata = test_c, type = "response")
```

```r
snippet b404_t2_logit_eval
th_grid <- seq(0.2, 0.75, by = 0.05)
logit_grid <- map_dfr(th_grid, ~ class_metrics(test_c$churn, p_logit, threshold = .x, cost_fn = 4))
best_thr <- logit_grid %>% slice_min(expected_cost, n = 1)
logit_grid
best_thr
```

```r
snippet b404_t2_rf_cv
set.seed(90)
fold_id <- sample(rep(1:5, length.out = nrow(train_c)))
mtry_grid <- c(2, 4, 6, 8)
rf_cv <- map_dfr(mtry_grid, function(m) {
  aucs <- map_dbl(1:5, function(k) {
    tr <- train_c[fold_id != k, ]
    va <- train_c[fold_id == k, ]
    fit_k <- randomForest(churn ~ . - state, data = tr, ntree = 450, mtry = m)
    p_k <- predict(fit_k, newdata = va, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]
    auc_rank(va$churn, p_k)
  })
  tibble(mtry = m, cv_auc = mean(aucs))
})
best_mtry <- rf_cv %>% slice_max(cv_auc, n = 1) %>% pull(mtry)
rf_cv
```

```r
snippet b404_t2_boost_eval
train_g <- train_c %>% mutate(churn01 = if_else(churn == "Yes", 1, 0))
test_g <- test_c %>% mutate(churn01 = if_else(churn == "Yes", 1, 0))
gbm_fit <- gbm(
  churn01 ~ . - churn - state,
  distribution = "bernoulli",
  data = train_g,
  n.trees = 700,
  interaction.depth = 3,
  shrinkage = 0.03,
  n.minobsinnode = 15,
  verbose = FALSE
)
tree_grid <- seq(25, 700, by = 25)
auc_path <- map_dbl(tree_grid, function(nt) {
  p_nt <- predict(gbm_fit, newdata = test_g, n.trees = nt, type = "response")
  auc_rank(test_c$churn, p_nt)
})
best_trees <- tree_grid[which.max(auc_path)]
best_trees
```

```r
snippet b404_t2_final
p_rf <- predict(rf_fit, newdata = test_c, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]
rf_eval <- class_metrics(test_c$churn, p_rf, threshold = best_thr$threshold, cost_fn = 4)
p_boost <- predict(gbm_fit, newdata = test_g, n.trees = best_trees, type = "response")
boost_eval <- class_metrics(test_c$churn, p_boost, threshold = best_thr$threshold, cost_fn = 4)
comparison <- bind_rows(
  best_thr %>% mutate(model = "Logistic"),
  rf_eval %>% mutate(model = paste0("RF mtry=", best_mtry)),
  boost_eval %>% mutate(model = paste0("GBM trees=", best_trees))
) %>% arrange(desc(auc))
comparison
```

# Fast exam usage guidance

1. Expand `b404_t1_load` / `b404_t2_load` first.
2. Paste helper snippets (`b404_util_auc`, `b404_util_metrics`) once at top.
3. Pick only model snippets needed for the actual question.
4. Use `*_final` table snippet for recommendation paragraph.
